name: NIST macOS Security (mSCP) — compliance import
description: Imports the results of a NIST macOS Security Compliance Project (mSCP, pages.nist.gov/macos_security) baseline compliance scan into XORCISM's GRC layer. Parses the audit plist (org.<baseline>.audit.plist, finding==true means a failed rule), a results JSON, or the compliance script's console summary, and records a Compliance AUDIT in XCOMPLIANCE with one AUDITFINDING per failed rule (severity + NIST SP 800-53 references) — surfaced at /compliance-management and /compliance. The connector ingests scan output; it does not run the scan. Offline: pass `file`, or run with the bundled sample.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: An mSCP audit plist (org.<baseline>.audit.plist), results JSON, or compliance-script summary text

parameters.name: baseline
parameters.help: Baseline label if the file does not carry one (e.g. 800-53r5_high, cis_lvl1)

parameters.name: host
parameters.help: The audited Mac's hostname (used as the audit scope) if not in the file
